response: This function implements the standard matrix multiplication algorithm, taking two matrices A (of size m x n) and B (of size n x p) and computing their product as a new matrix C (of size m x p). It uses three nested loops to iterate over the rows of A, columns of B, and the shared inner dimension n, accumulating the dot product for each C[i][j] as the sum of A[i][k] * B[k][j] for k from 0 to n-1, resulting in O(m * n * p) time complexity.
